title: prunus nana var. alba
intro: Prunus nana var. alba, also known as Dwarf White Cherry, is a small shrub or tree species belonging to the Prunus genus. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent effects, derived from its fruit, leaves, and bark. Consuming the plant's fruit, leaves, or drinking tea made from its leaves may provide various health benefits, such as aiding digestion, reducing fever, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal issues.
